heroHeadline: US Rescues Second Downed Pilot in Iran Theater; Trump Confirms 'Miraculous' Recovery
heroSubtitle: Trump confirmed a second US pilot has been rescued after their F-15 was downed in the Iran theater, following an earlier confirmed rescue — indicating ongoing aerial combat losses as Iran's air defenses remain active despite sustained suppression strikes.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-05. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times.
